title: rangium koreanum var. autumnalis
intro: Rangium koreanum var. autumnalis, also known as Autumn Korean wormwood, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Autumn Korean wormwood include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
